top_signals.title: Judge blocks DOJ 'anti-weaponization' fund for longer, wants guarantee it’s dead
top_signals.summary: A judge gave Acting Attorney General Todd Blanche and Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent a week to submit a sworn declaration the DOJ fund was not going forward.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Christine Lagarde: Women and leadership: widening the pipeline
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
top_signals.summary: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Elon Musk Gave SpaceX Less Than 10% Chance of Succeeding
top_signals.summary: Elon Musk said he only gave SpaceX a less than 10% chance of succeeding. He spoke from Starbase, Texas via livestream and addressed SpaceX employees. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Options volume in space stocks boomed as investors look for any way 'to get long SpaceX'
top_signals.summary: "There's a ton of short-dated call buying in these names as a way to get long SpaceX," Danny Kirsch, head of options trading at Piper Sandler, said.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Exxon Studies Takeover Targets Including Woodside Energy
top_signals.summary: Exxon Mobil Corp. is studying potential acquisition targets including Australia’s Woodside Energy Group, as the US giant eyes options to deepen its presence in liquefied natural gas and Asian markets, according to people with knowledge of the matter.

top_signals.title: In a first, consumer consultations in Japan about social media top 100,000
top_signals.summary: Those in their 50s and older accounted for more than half of the total social media-related consultations to consumer affairs centers.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
